reference: Hello. You could be suffering from a pinched nerve in the back of your neck due to possibly a disc prolapse. I advise you to apply a hot water bottle to the painful areas and take pain relievers and muscle relaxants for pain relief. You may need to get a magnetic resonance imaging scan for confirmation of the nerve pinching, followed by treatment according to the degree of compression.
text: Ну, їм так не обов'язково було всіх спасибі ділитися. Але вони тут намагалися...
